callbacks.name: Backend Notify
callbacks.trigger: After an e-payment or Direct Pay 3D transaction completes
callbacks.verification: No signature on the callback; TapPay recommends re-querying via Record API (rec_trade_id) to confirm
callbacks.expected_response: Merchant must respond HTTP 200; otherwise TapPay resends at 1/2/4/8/16 minutes, up to five times

callbacks.name: Frontend Redirect
callbacks.trigger: After an e-payment or Direct Pay 3D transaction completes
callbacks.transport: Browser web redirect (GET) to frontend_redirect_url with query-string params
callbacks.verification: Frontend redirect could be faked; verify with Backend Notify + Record API

field_conditions.rule: merchant_group_id cannot be used together with merchant_id
result_url (frontend_redirect_url + backend_notify_url) is required for e-payment and Direct Pay 3D transactions
card_ccv and ccv_prime are mutually exclusive
field_conditions.when: either card_ccv or ccv_prime is used
field_conditions.source: tappay-backend-api.md — Pay by Card Token API (card_ccv / ccv_prime)

field_conditions.rule: amount is required only for partial refund; instalment and T2P transactions do not support partial refunds
time is required within filters and its time frame must be ≤ 90 days

test_cases.name: Sandbox Pay by Prime (test prime)
test_cases.source: tappay-backend-api.md — Pay by Prime API (sandbox test prime / format block)

missing.detail: additional_data is described as encrypted/decrypted but the source states no algorithm/mode/key — cannot document a crypto scheme
Callbacks carry no signature; integrity relies on re-querying Record API
